verses.text: Mual Siangtho tungah ama phuhsa khuapi om hi
Topa in Israel gam mundang khempeuhte sangin Zion kulhkongpi itzaw hi
Pasian' khuapi aw, na minthan'na teng hong kigengen hi
Kei hong theite lakah Egypt leh Babylon ka hel hi. Filistia, Taia leh Ethiopia-te zong kihel a, “Hihte pen hua lai mah panin a piang ahi hi,” kici ding hi
Zion tawh kisai-in ahih leh, “Minam khempeuh ama sung pana suak ahi hi,” kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Sangpenpa mahmah in amah kipsak ding hi
Topa in, “Hihte pen hua lai-a suak,” ci-in minam khempeuh ciamtehin a gelh ding hi
Tua sunga teng mite in, “Kote' lungdamna khempeuh nangma sungah om hi,” ci ciat ding uh hi.
